title: Update Design System CSS Variables for Enhanced Button Styling
description: Add new CSS variables to design-system.css to support enhanced button styling with higher contrast borders and touch-friendly sizing. This establishes the foundation for improved button visibility and accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: New CSS variable --button-min-size: 48px added to design-system.css
Enhanced neon border variables with higher opacity values
All new variables follow existing naming conventions
No breaking changes to existing styles
technicalNotes: Add variables under existing spacing/border sections
Ensure backward compatibility with existing components
Consider mobile and desktop touch targets (minimum 48x48px)
testingStrategy: Visual regression testing - verify existing components still render correctly with new variables available
rollbackPlan: Remove new variables if they conflict with existing styles
